message:
fix(release): pin frankensqlite to 070ff68 (fixes vdbe compile errors)

The previous pin (f2b47b5) had pre-existing compile errors in
fsqlite-vdbe (PAGE_SIZE not found, as_u32 missing, type mismatches).
070ff68 is one commit ahead and fixes these issues.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -35,7 +35,7 @@ notify = "*"
